description: The Bellocco 'ndrina is a powerful clan of the 'Ndrangheta based in Rosarno, Calabria, Italy, founded in the 1960s by Umberto Bellocco. It is heavily involved in drug trafficking, arms trafficking, extortion, and control of commercial activities in the Gioia Tauro plain. The clan has a strong presence in northern Italy, particularly in Varese, and has been involved in international drug trafficking operations. Umberto Bellocco also helped establish the Sacra Corona Unita in Apulia.
